Headline: #66 Chicago Temporary Reroute at Chicago/Wood
ShortDescription: #66 Chicago buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions, due to a festival near Chicago/Wood.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#66 Chicago buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions, due to a festival near Chicago/Wood.

#66 Chicago buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Chicago, Damen, Division, Ashland, and Chicago then resume their normal route. 

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #66 Chicago Temporary Westbound Reroute at Chicago/Wells
ShortDescription: Westbound #66 Chicago buses are temporarily rerouted due to a festival near Chicago/Wells.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Westbound #66 Chicago buses are temporarily rerouted due to a festival near Chicago/Wells.

Westbound #66 Chicago buses are temporarily rerouted via Chicago, LaSalle, Grand, Milwaukee, and Chicago then resume their normal route. 

Eastbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #37 Sedgwick buses Temporary Southbound Reroute near Chicago/Wells
ShortDescription: Southbound 37 Sedgwick buses are temporarily rerouted via Chicago, LaSalle, Grand, Wells and over normal route: due to a street blockage near Chicago/Wells.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Southbound #37 Sedgwick buses are temporarily rerouted via Chicago, LaSalle, Grand, Wells and over normal route: due to a street blockage near Chicago/Wells.

Northbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Trains rerouted downtown: Stations along Lake and Wabash closed
ShortDescription: Orange, Green, Pink and Brown Line trains will be rerouted downtown for work on building a new State/Lake station.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Orange, Green, Pink and Brown line trains will be rerouted downtown for work on building a new State/Lake station.

Orange and Brown Lines: Trains will operate as one route between Kimball and Midway, via the Wells and Van Buren sides of the Loop, downtown.

Green Line: Trains will operate between Harlem/Lake and 63rd street terminals, but via Wells and Van Buren.

Pink Line: Trains will operate between 54th/Cermak and Clinton, only. For continuing service, transfer at Clinton to a Green Line train toward 63rd.

Loop 'L' and subways: To transfer between the Loop elevated and the subways, transfer at H.W. Library (Loop elevated lines) and Jackson (Blue or Red lines via subway).

Tip: Exit at Washington/Wells and board any bus at the Washington/LaSalle Loop Link station for service to Michigan Avenue, Millennium and Grant parks.
